description: Address all 5 issues from the 2025-01-20 review: HMAC mismatch, unauthenticated webhook, no body size limit, silent exception swallowing, and SSRF protection gaps.
steps: Fix heartbeat HMAC mismatch in webhook_master.py: reconstruct sign payload as body + b':' + timestamp.encode() before computing HMAC

Add WEBHOOK_SECRET env var support: generate random if not provided, pass as secret_token in setWebhook API call in docker-entrypoint.sh, verify X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token header in webhook_master.py
Add MAX_BODY_SIZE = 1_048_576 (1 MB) check in do_POST before reading body, return 413 if exceeded
Add traceback.print_exc() in _process_update exception handler instead of bare pass
Add 169.254.x.x and fc00::/7 to SSRF private IP checks
acceptance_criteria: handle_heartbeat validates HMAC against body + ':' + timestamp concatenated
WEBHOOK_SECRET is checked in /webhook endpoint, rejecting requests without valid secret token
_process_update logs exceptions to stderr via traceback.print_exc()
